name: HIRM
description: HIRM (Hierarchical Information-Reality Model) is David's original consciousness research framework. Mathematical model: C(t) = Phi(t) × R(t) × D(t), with C_critical = 8.3 ± 0.6 bits. Unifies IIT, GNWT, FEP, HOT, and AST theories.
purpose: Develop and validate a mathematically rigorous, falsifiable framework for consciousness emergence through self-reference phase transitions at criticality.
success_criteria: C_critical calibrated against empirical neural data
tagline: Mathematical consciousness framework. C(t) = Phi × R × D.
notes: Protocol v2.3. Session 39+. 193 papers in corpus. Simulation validation: qualitative pass. Locked constants: C_critical = 8.3 ± 0.6 bits, universality class 3D Ising.
author: dk-001
